## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run poe gate` passes locally (lint + format-check + typecheck + complexity + test)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (coverage stays ≥ 90%)
- [ ] Public API / CLI changes are reflected in the README and CHANGELOG
- [ ] Verification / signature / integrity paths stay **fail-closed** (no weakened trust check)
